subject: fix(ui): harden React migration — 12 fixes for bugs, a11y, architecture
body:
Fix 3 bugs, convert 3 vanilla DOM patterns to React, and close 2
accessibility gaps found during systematic HTML-to-React review.

Bugs:
- Fix body scroll lock race condition between overlays (new useScrollLock hook)
- Fix Chart.js theme colors going stale after dark/light toggle
- Fix SettingsPane label-select association for screen readers

React migration:
- Convert heatmap tooltip from vanilla DOM to React portal
- Move embed ?theme=/?bg= overrides from module scope into useEffect
- Consolidate URL param parsing into shared urlParams.js module

Accessibility:
- Add full keyboard navigation to FilterSidebar MultiSelect
- Add aria-labels to 12+ clickable elements across Health, Timeline, Progress

Tags: react, accessibility, bugfix, refactor, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: react-migration
Semver: minor
